description: Style NoteMinimalist styling peppered with innovative design details, we love wearable timepieces by QnQ! Styled to perfection, this watch is the perfect accessory staple you've been looking for. Liven up the summer with this watch from QnQ!Product DetailsCase style: Stainless steel square case Dial style: Black dial with metallic hands and branding displayed on the dialStrap style: Brown genuine leather strap with a tang claspFeatures: Date aperture on the dial and screw to reset time  Waterproof to 3 BAR, allowing you to wear it in light rainWarranty: 1 yearSizeCase diameter: 44 mm Case thickness: 6 mm
